# Release v1.4.1

Fix `publish-release.sh` editor detection to correctly open release notes in Windsurf/Cascade.

---

## Changelog

## [1.4.1] - 2026-06-03

### Fixed

- `publish-release.sh` now correctly opens the release notes file in Windsurf when run from the Windsurf IDE — `windsurf` CLI check added before `devin` and `code` in the editor fallback chain
